dataset_name: Cortex Air Mode - Block B Special Cargo Rules
purpose: Mock/reference dataset for Cortex air-mode R&D agents. Intended to trigger intake questions, hard gates, planning factors, and confidence caps for special cargo.
legal_note: R&D/mock reference only. Not a production compliance dataset. Replace or validate with current licensed/API data before real commercial use.
integration_note: Use Block B after Block A. If is_dg_code=true or category implies dangerous goods, cross-check the Block A DG dataset before final recommendation.
